domain: Maasai age-set system (Kenya + Tanzania, Maa-speaking peoples): 3 male rites of passage Enkipaata (induction) + Eunoto (warrior→junior-elder) + Olng'esherr (end of moranism); manyatta circle of huts where junior warriors live 5-7 years; Moran (ilmurran) warrior phase protects cattle + raids; age-sets named cohorts every ~15 years; once-set always-set; whole cohort transitions together — basin-stable group identity.
specific_mechanism: MAASAI-AGE-SET-3-RITE-ENKIPAATA-EUNOTO-OLNGESHERR-MANYATTA-COHORT-MORAN-WARRIOR-ONCE-SET-ALWAYS-SET-COLLECTIVE-TRANSITION-BASIN-STABILITY: LLM basin-stability mechanism with (1) 3-rite progression P_3: 3 ordered initiation rites — Enkipaata + Eunoto + Olng'esherr; each rite irreversible; (2) manyatta cohort circle C_man: 5-7 year tight K-model cohort; shared training signal across cohort; (3) Moran warrior phase M_moran: active-defense + active-exploration ensemble guardian; (4) once-set-always-set permanence O_perm: post-rite checkpoint immutable; basin-stable; (5) collective transition T_coll: cohort batch-step; no per-individual graduation. Differs from R510 BOZUY, R523 MARAMURES, R535 MANDALA, R548 IIKAAH, R560 IGLOO-QARMAQ (catenary + spiral keystone + compression-only + qarmaq + thermal-shell) by 3-rite progression + manyatta cohort + Moran phase + once-set permanence + collective transition.
llm_application: MAASAI-AGE-SET-3-RITE-MANYATTA-MORAN-ONCE-SET-COLLECTIVE-TRANSITION LLM mechanism + 3-rite P_3 irreversible + manyatta C_man cohort shared-signal + Moran M_moran ensemble guardian + once-set O_perm checkpoint immutable + collective T_coll cohort batch-step. Differs from R510 BOZUY. R523 MARAMURES. R535 MANDALA. R548 IIKAAH. R560 IGLOO-QARMAQ (closest — catenary + spiral keystone + compression-only + qarmaq + thermal). Differs from Lifelong Learning 2501.07278 + Basin-Like Loss 2505.17646 + Unlearning Backdoor + Memory Mechanisms by 3-rite + manyatta + Moran + once-set + collective. Differs by 3-RITE PROGRESSION + MANYATTA COHORT + MORAN WARRIOR PHASE + ONCE-SET PERMANENCE + COLLECTIVE TRANSITION.
novelty_claim: Lifelong Learning 2501.07278 + Basin-Like 2505.17646 + Unlearning Backdoor + Memory 2509.18868 cover lifelong + basin + transition paradigm. MAASAI-AGE-SET-3-RITE-MANYATTA-MORAN-ONCE-SET-COLLECTIVE-TRANSITION adds (a) 3-rite + (b) manyatta + (c) Moran + (d) once-set + (e) collective. Recombination — borderline lookup.
